creator: jb.1234abcd@gmail.com
text:
Notebook is on AC.
Battery shows 98% the entire day, and tooltip shows "Charging from AC".
Two possibilities:
1. the plugin does not charge to the max possible and does not stop
   charging
2. or, the tooltip shows wrong message

/var/db/pkg/xfce4-battery-plugin-1.0.5/
/var/db/pkg/xfce-4.10/

How-To-Repeat: run plugin
